title: JIT Universal Hydrator Configuration
description: Schema configuration to validate JSON template schemas mapped by hydrate-v4.js

querySelector.description: The CSS Selector to target. If omitted at the root level, defaults back to the unique object key name.

insertion.description: Method of rendering positioning relative to the target element. Defaults to 'replace'.

tag.description: The HTML tag name of the element (e.g., 'div', 'span', 'script', 'a'). If omitted and textContent exists, a raw text node is made.

textContent.description: Text value to be added inside the element.

innerHTML.description: Raw HTML string markup to inject directly into the target node element.

items.description: An ordered list containing recursive child nodes to render and append.

additionalProperties.description: Any additional fields (such as 'href', 'src', 'class', 'id', 'target', 'defer') are dynamically treated as standard element HTML attributes and bound via setAttribute.
